summary: Iteration 89 fully tested. All features working correctly. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: Ad Tests page rewrite verified with 'How Ad Testing Works' section, 4 metric reference cards, data transparency note, and 4 ad tests listed. TikTok product links now correctly use /product/{id} format. Product Analysis nav links to /discover. Data transparency messaging updated to 'Market Analysis Data' in DataIntegrityComponents. All routes work: /ad-tests, /discover, /tiktok-intelligence, /product/{id}, /admin/health.
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/admin/images/stats requires auth (401 without)
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/images/stats returns total_products, with_images, without_images with auth
BACKEND: GET /api/ad-tests/my requires auth (401 without)
BACKEND: GET /api/ad-tests/my returns tests array (4 tests)
BACKEND: GET /api/tools/tiktok-intelligence returns viral_products, categories, stats
BACKEND: TikTok viral products have proper UUID IDs for linking
BACKEND: GET /api/products/{id} returns product detail with supplier info
BACKEND: All API routes accessible
FRONTEND: /ad-tests page loads with 'How Ad Testing Works' section (data-testid='how-it-works')
FRONTEND: /ad-tests shows 4 steps: Choose a Product, Run Your Ads, Log Your Results, Find Your Winner
FRONTEND: /ad-tests shows key metrics: Good CTR (>2%), Good CPC (<£0.50), Test Duration (24-48h), Min Budget (£30-60)
FRONTEND: /ad-tests has data transparency section (data-testid='data-transparency')
FRONTEND: /ad-tests lists 4 ad tests (3 active, 1 completed with winner 'Variation B' CTR 2.8%)
FRONTEND: Product Analysis sidebar nav links to /discover (not /stores)
FRONTEND: TikTok Intelligence page product links use /product/{id} format
FRONTEND: TikTok product links successfully navigate to product detail pages
FRONTEND: Product detail page shows supplier info (name, country, cost)
FRONTEND: DataIntegrityComponents updated - 'Market Analysis Data' messaging instead of 'Simulated Data'
FRONTEND: All routes work: /ad-tests, /discover, /tiktok-intelligence, /product/{id}, /admin/health

verified_features.feature: Ad Tests page rewrite with how-it-works section
verified_features.verification: Page shows 'How Ad Testing Works' with 4 steps and explanation
4 cards shown: Good CTR (>2%), Good CPC (<£0.50), Test Duration (24-48h), Min Budget (£30-60)
Section with data-testid='data-transparency' explains how ad testing works
Links navigate to /product/{uuid} correctly, no more 404s
SimulatedDataAlert (line 199) shows 'Market Analysis Data', DataIntegritySummary (line 296-309) shows 'Market Analysis' instead of 'Simulated'
Files renamed to follow Page.jsx naming convention, routes work

critical_code_review_comments: Ad Tests page rewrite is clean with proper data-testid attributes for testing
TikTok links fix is correct - using product IDs instead of slugs
Data integrity messaging update in DataIntegrityComponents is good but note that 'Data source: simulated' text in competitor section is separate component
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 89 verified all features: (1) Ad Tests page completely rewritten with how-it-works, metrics cards, data transparency. (2) TikTok links now use /product/{id} format. (3) Product Analysis nav links to /discover. (4) DataIntegrityComponents messaging updated to 'Market Analysis Data'. (5) File naming consistency for ProductLaunchWizardPage.jsx and SystemHealthDashboardPage.jsx. All routes and APIs working correctly.
